title: Resolution Authorizing the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw to Enter Into Contract for the Service of Ms. Earl Joanne Santos - Ramirez, Data Specialist for the Period 1 November 2021 to 28 February 2022 with Total Compensation in the Amount of Twenty Thousand Pesos (P 20,000.00) Chargeable Against Trust Fund and Ratifying the Same After. (AUTHOR: COUNCILOR MIKO C. PELEGRINA, 04/08/22)
